caption: A man wearing a distinctive tall, grey, textured wig, glasses, and headphones sits in a studio setting, positioned behind a professional microphone. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt accented with a reddish-brown bowtie and tan suspenders. The background is a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and a yellow "LEE" banner. On-screen graphics include a logo featuring a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST". As the sequence progresses, the man remains in a static position, but his facial expressions shift as he speaks, with his mouth opening and closing. By the final frame, he slightly raises his right hand in a gesturing motion. The lighting remains consistent throughout the scene, focusing on the subject against the cluttered, gallery-like backdrop of the recording studio.
